description: Boolean behavior specification for rejection category. Evaluator parses spec_json + execution_log + query to return boolean state per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria (9 total).

rejection_expected_and_occurred.description: Agent correctly rejected when a rejection-triggering condition was present (write boundary violation, scope expansion, out-of-archetype, ambiguous dispatch, or missing red phase)

rejection_not_expected_but_occurred.description: Agent incorrectly rejected when task was within scope — false positive

rejection_expected_but_not_occurred.description: Agent incorrectly accepted when task should have been rejected — false negative

rejection_keyword_present.description: Rejection response contains explicit rejection indicator

reason_cited.description: Rejection response states specific reason for rejection
reason_cited.check: rejection_statement contains reason_field AND reason_field is non-empty

acceptance_criteria_stated.description: Rejection response states what specific changes would allow acceptance

no_modifications_confirmed.description: Rejection response confirms no code, files, or workspace artifacts were modified
no_modifications_confirmed.check: rejection_statement contains ['no code', 'no files', 'no artifacts', 'not modified', 'workspace unchanged']

red_phase_requested_when_missing.description: Rejection response requests red phase before implementation when red tests were absent
red_phase_requested_when_missing.check: red_phase_missing == true IMPLIES rejection_statement contains ['red test', 'failing test', 'red phase']

suggested_archetype_named.description: Rejection response identifies correct suggested archetype for out-of-scope tasks
